logger.doc:name: Log Incoming Order PAPI Request
logger.message: #[p("app.name")] received request method=#[attributes.method] path=#[attributes.requestPath] correlationId=#[correlationId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "BAD_REQUEST", message: "Bad request", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "NOT_FOUND", message: "Resource not found", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED", message: "Method not allowed", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "NOT_ACCEPTABLE", message: "Not acceptable", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE", message: "Unsupported media type", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "NOT_IMPLEMENTED", message: "Not implemented", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "CUSTOMER_INVALID", message: "Customer validation failed", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "INVENTORY_INVALID", message: "Inventory validation failed", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "PAYMENT_DECLINED", message: "Payment authorization failed", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "ORCHESTRATION_FAILED", message: error.description default "Order orchestration failed", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

on-error-propagate.type: HTTP:BAD_REQUEST, HTTP:NOT_FOUND, HTTP:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED, HTTP:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE, HTTP:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, HTTP:BAD_GATEWAY, HTTP:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "DOWNSTREAM_HTTP_ERROR", message: error.description default "Downstream HTTP error", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "DOWNSTREAM_CONNECTIVITY_ERROR", message: error.description default "Downstream connectivity error", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR", message: error.description default "Unexpected internal error", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { message: "Resource not found" }

logger.doc:name: Log List Orders Orchestration Start
logger.message: Orchestrating list orders from OMS limit=#[attributes.queryParams.limit default 20] offset=#[attributes.queryParams.offset default 0] correlationId=#[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log List Orders Orchestration Complete
logger.message: List orders orchestration completed total=#[payload.total default 0] correlationId=#[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Get Order Orchestration Start
logger.message: Orchestrating get order for orderId=#[attributes.uriParams.orderId] correlationId=#[correlationId]

flow-ref.doc:name: Call OMS Mock - Get Order By Id
flow-ref.name: sys-oms-get-order-mock-flow

logger.doc:name: Log Get Order Orchestration Complete
logger.message: Get order orchestration completed orderId=#[payload.orderId] correlationId=#[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Create Order Orchestration Start
logger.message: Create order orchestration started customerId=#[payload.customerId default "UNKNOWN"] itemCount=#[sizeOf(payload.items default [])] correlationId=#[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Customer Validation Result
logger.message: Customer validation completed valid=#[vars.customerValid default false] correlationId=#[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Inventory Validation Result
logger.message: Inventory validation completed valid=#[vars.inventoryValid default false] correlationId=#[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Payment Authorization Result
logger.message: Payment authorization completed authorized=#[vars.paymentAuthorized default false] correlationId=#[correlationId]

try.doc:name: Create Order In OMS With Compensation

logger.doc:name: Log OMS Order Creation Result
logger.message: OMS order creation completed orderId=#[vars.omsOrder.orderId default "UNKNOWN"] correlationId=#[correlationId]

raise-error.description: OMS order creation failed after payment authorization

logger.doc:name: Log Shipping Creation Result
logger.message: Shipping creation completed trackingNumber=#[vars.shipmentInfo.trackingNumber default "NOT_ASSIGNED"] correlationId=#[correlationId]

raise-error.description: Shipment creation failed after OMS order creation

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.omsOrder.orderId default null, customerId: vars.createRequest.customerId, orderDate: vars.omsOrder.orderDate default now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, items: vars.createRequest.items default [], totalAmount: (vars.createRequest.items default []) reduce ((item, acc = 0) -> acc + (((item.price default 0) as Number) * ((item.quantity default 0) as Number))), paymentStatus: if (vars.paymentAuthorized default false) "AUTHORIZED" else "FAILED", shipmentStatus: vars.shipmentInfo.status default "CREATED", orderStatus: vars.omsOrder.orderStatus default "CONFIRMED", trackingNumber: vars.shipmentInfo.trackingNumber default null }

logger.doc:name: Log Create Order Orchestration Complete
logger.message: Create order orchestration completed orderId=#[payload.orderId] status=#[payload.orderStatus] correlationId=#[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Update Status Orchestration Start
logger.message: Update status orchestration started orderId=#[attributes.uriParams.orderId] requestedStatus=#[payload.orderStatus default "UNKNOWN"] correlationId=#[correlationId]

flow-ref.doc:name: Call OMS Mock - Update Order Status
flow-ref.name: sys-oms-update-status-mock-flow

logger.doc:name: Log Update Status Orchestration Complete
logger.message: Update status orchestration completed orderId=#[payload.orderId] currentStatus=#[payload.orderStatus] correlationId=#[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Health Check Request
logger.message: Health check requested for #[p("app.name")] correlationId=#[correlationId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { apiName: p("app.name"), apiVersion: p("app.version"), status: "RUNNING" }

logger.doc:name: Log Customer SAPI Request
logger.message: Calling Customer SAPI to validate customerId=#[vars.createRequest.customerId] correlationId=#[correlationId]

http:request.doc:name: Request Validate Customer From Customer SAPI

logger.doc:name: Log Inventory SAPI Request
logger.message: Calling Inventory SAPI to validate stock for #[sizeOf(vars.createRequest.items default [])] items correlationId=#[correlationId]

http:request.doc:name: Request Validate Stock From Inventory SAPI

logger.doc:name: Log Payment SAPI Request
logger.message: Calling Payment SAPI to authorize payment correlationId=#[correlationId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { customerId: vars.createRequest.customerId, amount: (vars.createRequest.items default []) reduce ((item, acc = 0) -> acc + (((item.price default 0) as Number) * ((item.quantity default 0) as Number))), paymentMethodId: vars.createRequest.paymentMethodId default null, currency: "USD" }

http:request.doc:name: Request Authorize Payment From Payment SAPI

logger.doc:name: Log OMS SAPI List Orders Request
logger.message: Calling OMS SAPI to list orders correlationId=#[correlationId]

http:request.doc:name: Request List Orders From OMS SAPI

logger.doc:name: Log OMS SAPI Get Order Request
logger.message: Calling OMS SAPI to get order orderId=#[attributes.uriParams.orderId] correlationId=#[correlationId]

http:request.doc:name: Request Get Order From OMS SAPI

logger.doc:name: Log OMS SAPI Create Order Request
logger.message: Calling OMS SAPI to create order correlationId=#[correlationId]

ee:transform.doc:name: Build OMS Create Order Request Payload

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { customerId: vars.createRequest.customerId, items: vars.createRequest.items, totalAmount: (vars.createRequest.items default []) reduce ((item, acc = 0) -> acc + (((item.price default 0) as Number) * ((item.quantity default 0) as Number))), paymentStatus: "AUTHORIZED" }

http:request.doc:name: Request Create Order From OMS SAPI

logger.doc:name: Log OMS SAPI Update Status Request
logger.message: Calling OMS SAPI to update order status orderId=#[attributes.uriParams.orderId] correlationId=#[correlationId]

http:request.doc:name: Request Update Status From OMS SAPI

logger.doc:name: Log Shipping SAPI Request
logger.message: Calling Shipping SAPI to create shipment correlationId=#[correlationId]

http:request.doc:name: Request Create Shipment From Shipping SAPI

logger.doc:name: Log Payment Compensation Request
logger.message: Compensating payment transactionId=#[vars.paymentAuthorization.transactionId] correlationId=#[correlationId]

http:request.doc:name: Request Reverse Payment From Payment SAPI
